grok-bootstrap-publisher.argument_contract: fixed isolated-Python prefix plus at most 64 forwarded administrative arguments

grok-bootstrap-package-activate.argument_contract: fixed isolated-Python activator vector; no caller arguments forwarded

required_build_parameters.PUBLIC_KEY_HEX: raw 32-byte production Ed25519 public key as 64 lowercase hex characters

package_transaction.closed_activation_environment: freestanding raw-syscall launcher directly execve()s /usr/bin/python3 -I -B -S with fixed script and newly constructed exact PATH, locale, and bytecode envp
package_transaction.launcher_elf_gate: host machine must be x86_64 or AArch64; ELF has no PT_INTERP, PT_DYNAMIC, DT_NEEDED, or undefined symbols
package_transaction.launcher_close_range_failure: fail closed before Python with exit 126
package_transaction.make_preparse_reason: GNU Make processes MAKEFLAGS, MAKEFILES, includes, and evaluations before a recipe can establish a privilege boundary
package_transaction.package_manager_pre_execution_requiremen: one authenticated five-file generation is installed; activator and payload ancestry is root-owned and non-group-or-other-writable; both roots and every file have the exact ownership, mode, type, link count, architecture, and static-ELF contract declared above before the current launcher is executed
package_transaction.current_launcher_execution_authority: administrative package signature plus package-manager pre-execution validation; Python revalidation protects subsequent use after the current launcher has already executed
package_transaction.pending_marker_content: canonical JSON binding the exact trust anchor, every payload artifact mode, size, SHA-256 digest, and their canonical generation ID

trust_anchor_introspection.content: canonical key id and raw Ed25519 public key reported directly from the compiled verifier

administrative_publisher.signed_input_path: absolute root-owned directory with root-owned, non-group-or-other-writable, no-symlink ancestry from /
administrative_publisher.closed_launcher: freestanding static host-ABI no-interpreter ELF directly execve()s fixed /usr/bin/python3 -I -B -S prefix with exact envp and forwards at most 64 arguments

selector.content: exactly 64 lowercase hex signed-application id bytes plus newline
selector.native_enforcement: requested signed-application id must equal the fixed selector before verification and at the final exec boundary

transaction_lock.native_verifier: LOCK_SH acquired before first selector read and retained until successful execve closes the CLOEXEC descriptor
transaction_lock.administrative_publisher: LOCK_EX held across complete signed-application publication, selector rename, and durability fsyncs

dispatcher_staging.closed_inputs: installer-declared top-level runtime files, exactly one broker, and admitted grok_ms Python modules
dispatcher_staging.bootstrap_lane_authority: root-owned sealed anonymous dispatcher memfd inherited only from the native verifier and consumed before source discovery

target_identity.native_loader_boundary: production native execution is admitted only through fixed setuid sudo secure execution (AT_SECURE) or as a child of an already environment-isolated activator/publisher process; direct already-root invocation with hostile loader environment is unsupported
target_identity.root_invocation_requires: canonical nonzero SUDO_UID resolving to a non-root passwd account with a nonempty absolute home other than /
forwarded_environment: SUDO_UID=<validated canonical value, root invocation only>

package_requirements.future_rotation_requires: an explicit bounded multi-key or new signed-application-ID migration that preserves retained rollback applications
